channel.title: Christmas Tree Curbside Pickup & Recycling on Cayman
channel.description: Recent content in Christmas Tree Curbside Pickup & Recycling on Cayman

item.title: Lost & Found
item.description: Sometimes we find ornaments that people have left on their trees. We will take a picture and post them on this page. Please contact treedrive105@gmail.com if one of the ornaments is yours.

item.title: Pickup Day
item.description: The Scouts of Troop 105 will be in your Pembroke neighborhood on Saturday, January 7, 2023 to pick up your Christmas tree curbside in exchange for a $15 donation. To register for your tree to be picked up, please click here or go to the Register tab at the top of this website. Please register by January 6th. Thank you to the Pembroke residents who support our effort each year!

item.title: Register
item.description: Step 1. Fill in your address and contact information. Contact Info First Name Last Name Email Phone Pickup Location Address Town State Comment Payment Number of Trees If you have an artificial tree, or no tree, but would like to support Pembroke Troop 105's Scouting program, indicate 0 trees and an additional donation amount. Additional Donation Amount Amount to pay: $ Payment Method Attach cash or check payable to Troop 105 to tree on pickup day.
